indicators.name: Large corner bathtub
indicators.rationale: The large corner bathtub takes up a significant amount of space, leaving limited room for computer work.

indicators.name: Sink
indicators.rationale: The sink is present but does not contribute to the suitability for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work due to the presence of a large corner bathtub, but has a positive aspect with the window allowing natural light.
